final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu cover image for a feature announcement.

Style/medium: needs a "高级杂志感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk magazine editorial design, Cereal magazine minimalist typography, 2010s Monocle clean layout system; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use diagonal composition
Subject: must include the announcement of GPT-image-2 on Lovart platform as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: must use high-contrast accent colors
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
